tagline: Deprecated — discover features from the marketplace instead.
longDescription:
The legacy `/toolkit` inventory command no longer exists. Feature discovery has moved to the YouCoded marketplace in the app — browse, search, and install plugins visually rather than reading a printed list. This registry entry is kept for historical clients and will be removed in a future cleanup.

If you installed this in the past: uninstall it from the app's marketplace. The commands it used to index (`/health`, `/update`, `/diagnose`) still exist inside the `youcoded-core` plugin.
